title: Dinosaur Discovery Coloring Page
description: A simple coloring page featuring friendly dinosaur outlines that introduce young children to different types of dinosaurs while developing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color the dinosaurs using crayons or colored pencils. Try to use different colors for each dinosaur!

content.image: Simple black outline drawing of three dinosaurs: a Triceratops with its three horns and frill, a Tyrannosaurus Rex with small arms and big teeth, and a long-necked Brachiosaurus eating from a tree. All dinosaurs have simple, child-friendly features with thick black outlines on white background.
learningFacts: Triceratops had three horns on its face
T-Rex was one of the largest meat-eating dinosaurs
Brachiosaurus was one of the tallest dinosaurs and ate plants
Dinosaurs lived millions of years ago
Scientists who study dinosaurs are called paleontologists
